creator: alexander.nusov@nfvexpress.com
text:
Created attachment 176141
glance dependencies

This patch adds the glance, Openstack Image Service from Newton release.

New packages:
./devel/py-automaton
./devel/py-castellan
./devel/py-cursive
./devel/py-glance-store
./devel/py-taskflow
./devel/py-wsme
./misc/py-glance

new uids/gids:
glance/glance

new rc services:
glance-api
glance-registry
glance-scrubber

Information how to install the glance you may find here
_https://medium.com/nfv-express/installing-glance-on-freebsd-eb03793f18c7#.avvw7z5d9
